title: quercus braianensis
intro: Quercus braianensis, also known as Chinese white oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Quercus braianensis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Quercus braianensis, such as decoctions and infusions, are often used to make teas and tonics that are consumed for their medicinal properties.
